subtitles.original: ℃-uteの曲やった！
subtitles.english: We did a ℃-ute song!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: ℃-ute！
subtitles.english: ℃-ute!

subtitles.original: ℃-ute！
subtitles.english: ℃-ute!

subtitles.original: はい、せーの！
subtitles.english: Okay, ready, go!

subtitles.original: うー、℃-ute！
subtitles.english: Woo, ℃-ute!

subtitles.original: I'm すげーよ！キキララビビて！
subtitles.english: I'm amazing! Ki-Ki-Ra-Ra-Bi-Bi-te!

subtitles.original: すげーよはそんな共同体意識じゃないかもしれないw
subtitles.english: Maybe "amazing" doesn't quite show our group identity lol.

subtitles.original: いやいやいや！
subtitles.english: No, no, no!

subtitles.original: Well, when I chose to do these songs,
subtitles.english: Well, when I chose to do these songs,

subtitles.original: I really wanted to bring in ReGLOSS because I know they're all really good at dancing,
subtitles.english: I really wanted to bring in ReGLOSS because I know they're all really good at dancing,

subtitles.original: and performing. みなパフォーマンス上手いから、絶対ReGLOSS誘って完成度を高めたいと思って。
subtitles.english: and performing. Since you're all so good, I definitely wanted to invite ReGLOSS to raise the quality.

subtitles.original: でも、でも、何か困ったこととか、難しかった振りとか何かありましたか？
subtitles.english: But did you have any trouble, or was there any choreography that was difficult?

subtitles.original: 全部！全部難しかった！
subtitles.english: Everything! Everything was difficult!

subtitles.original: え、でもカッコよかった！みんなのコラボ見ててめっちゃカッコいいってなりました！
subtitles.english: But it was so cool! Watching everyone collaborate made me think, "That's so cool!"

subtitles.original: 私も！みんなでどんどん出来上がって、完成度が高くなっていくうちに...
subtitles.english: Me too! As we all gradually got it together and the quality got higher...

subtitles.original: もう幸せすぎて！みんなカッコいいって言ってくれてて嬉しかった！
subtitles.english: I was just too happy! I was so glad everyone said it was cool!

subtitles.original: カノンで交互の振りみたいなのが普段あんまりなかったから、ReGLOSS先輩に呼んでもらってそれが出来て、嬉しかったです！
subtitles.english: With the canon, we don't usually do much alternating choreography, so I was really happy that we were invited by our seniors to do it!

subtitles.original: 順番で回るとか結構多くて大変でした。すいません、難しい振り付け...
subtitles.english: Moving in order was quite frequent, so it was tough. Sorry for the difficult choreography...

subtitles.original: みなさんのこのコーナーは、℃-uteのコーナーであって、℃-uteっていうグループはダンスがマジでいつも難しいです。
subtitles.english: This segment was the ℃-ute corner, and the group called ℃-ute always has seriously difficult dances.

subtitles.original: ご、ごめんね、でもみんなよく出来てた！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: S-Sorry about that, but everyone did so well! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: u003Cteと言えば、I want to know everybody's like, favorite Hello Project song! ハロプロの好きな曲、知りたいけど...
subtitles.english: Speaking of ℃-ute, I want to know everybody's favorite Hello Project song! I want to know your favorite Hello Project songs...

subtitles.original: じゃ、まずすーちゃんありますか？お、お、アモーレ！アモーレ！
subtitles.english: First, Su-chan (Bijou), do you have one? Oh, "Amore! Amore!"

subtitles.original: アモーレ！アモーレ！が好き！おお、いいですね！最近の曲ですね！いいですね！
subtitles.english: She likes "Amore! Amore!" Oh, nice! It's a recent song! Nice!

subtitles.original: あと、かなでちゃんは？バカヤロー！おんなじ気分！あいたいとか...！が大好き！
subtitles.english: How about Kanade-chan? "Idiot! I feel the same way! Wanting to meet you...!" I love that!

subtitles.original: わかる！と、結構オタクと聞いて...
subtitles.english: I get it! And, I heard you're quite an otaku...

subtitles.original: 私の好きな曲はモーニング娘。'14さんの『時空を超え 宇宙を超え』
subtitles.english: My favorite song is Morning Musume '14's "Toki wo Koe Sora wo Koe".

subtitles.original: おお！『時空を超え 宇宙を超え』！名曲！しっとりしたカッコいい曲！
subtitles.english: Oh! "Toki wo Koe Sora wo Koe"! A masterpiece! A cool, emotional song!

subtitles.original: スマイレージさんは『天真爛漫』と『ぁまのじゃく』が好き。あと『ぁまのじゃく』...
subtitles.english: For S/mileage, I like "Tenshinranman" and "Amanojaku". Also "Amanojaku"...

subtitles.original: 『ぁまのじゃく』は、去年やってたんですよ！大好きです！おお、なるほど！
subtitles.english: We did "Amanojaku" last year! I love it! Oh, I see!

subtitles.original: りりかちゃんはどの曲ですか？
subtitles.english: Which song for you, Ririka-chan?

subtitles.original: 私は『ソラシド〜ねえねえ〜』が初めて聴いた時にめっちゃ素敵な曲だなと思って！Buono!ですね！
subtitles.english: For me, when I first heard "Solala-Do ~Nee Nee~", I thought it was such a wonderful song! That's Buono!, right!

subtitles.original: それも、Buono!好き！みんな大好きなBuono!ですね！と、ビビワンは？はい！ビビワン！
subtitles.english: I love Buono! too! The Buono! everyone loves, right! And Vivi-one? Yes, Vivi-one!

subtitles.original: チュ、チュ、チュ、サマーパーティー！キアラ先輩と一緒にチュッチュしたい！
subtitles.english: "Chu, chu, chu, Summer Party!" I want to go 'chu-chu' with Kiara-senpai!

subtitles.original: やめて！騙されないでください！可愛いw でも、このいろんな曲名聞くだけで、
subtitles.english: Stop! Please don't be tricked! So cute lol. But just hearing all these song titles,

subtitles.original: このハロプロカバーソングライブ、何度も何度もやりたいですけど、とりあえずは、あの、まだまだあります！
subtitles.english: makes me want to do this Hello Project cover song live over and over, but for now, we still have more!

subtitles.original: u003Cteの次に、他のパートも、他のグループもありますので、えー、次のパートに行きましょう！ReGLOSSのみんな、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: After ℃-ute, we also have other parts and other groups, so let's go to the next part! Thank you to everyone from ReGLOSS!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ということで、Let's go to the next corner！
subtitles.english: Thank you! And with that, Let's go to the next corner!

subtitles.original: S/mileage
subtitles.english: [S/mileage]

subtitles.original: 戌神ころね
subtitles.english: [Inugami Korone]

subtitles.original: 兎田ぺこら
subtitles.english: [Usada Pekora]

subtitles.original: ワトソン・アメリア
subtitles.english: [Watson Amelia]

subtitles.original: S/mileage
subtitles.english: [S/mileage]

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation - The Final Run**

Alright, let's get this done. The task is clear: create precise, audio-synchronized subtitles in JSON format. We're talking transcriptions and translations, adhering strictly to the millisecond timing of vocals, ruthlessly truncating those end times to avoid overlap. Character limits are a must, along with a keen ear for context-aware translations – smooth, natural, and grammatically sound. No pesky CC tags, and we’re accounting for on-screen text as visual events during the intro.

First, I had to analyze what was going on in the video. The start had some great fan interaction, shouting out their love for ℃-ute and their performances. ReGLOSS, it seems, got everyone involved, so this part of the concert had all the members of ReGLOSS, as well as several Vtubers that I was tasked with identifying, as well as the initial group on-stage.

I needed to extract the dialogue, and make sure that it was all right. The lyrics in the background were key to getting the translation, which was pretty straightforward. From what I was hearing, everyone seemed happy.

And then, a critical detail - from 04:20 onwards, we're silent. No vocals mean no subtitles. This required a quick check. I was right; the video was just background music, so the subtitles should end with the splash screens. It had to be done right, and that required a meticulous review of both the spoken lines and visual events, verifying those timecodes again to ensure the final output is perfect.
